name: Best of the Web (BOTW)
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on BestofWeb Local with Synup
detailed_paragraph: Best of the Web is one of the most visited online directory with over 16 million American businesses already listed. It enables customers to find business information, hours, locations, coupons and reviews.

seo.title: Best of the Web (BOTW)
seo.description: Enhance your digital presence. Synup's integration with Best of the Web ensures top-notch visibility for your business.
